Halloween Email Promotion #1               		                            Copyright Free Template



Subject: Give yourself a treat this month



Dear (first name), 



Halloween is coming upon us.  And while most 

trick-or-treaters are getting their costumes ready, 

we want to give you a treat.



[insert deal]



This deal is so huge that it may just have our

accountant so frightened that he will go out and

howl at the moon.



In fact, It scares me to think that [insert pain they’ll 

experience if they pass you up on this deal…continued 

weight gain, not enough clients, etc.].  



This ghostly bonus is only available until the stroke

of Midnight on Halloween. 



So don’t be a zombie—get in on this Halloween 

special and [insert benefit they’ll get when they 

buy from you]. 



Sincerely, 



(insert name) 



P.S.  This deal is very scary.  And, unlike a bag of 

Halloween candy that’ll be gone in a couple days, 

you’ll be [insert benefits they’ll get after they take

you up on your deal]. 



So to get this treat by the stroke of midnight, you’ve

got to [insert call to action…either give you a call, 

come to the store, or go to a website]. 



Miss this offer, and be “haunted” forever!
